item.title: Skill lifecycle + vetting
item.intent: Every skill installation must pass security vetting before activation. Rollback must restore the previous state if a skill breaks the agent.
item.description: CAPABILITY GATE: Skill lifecycle is what makes skills safe. Without it, installing a skill means manually copying files with no vetting, no rollback, no audit. The email-digest skill (CQ-022) must go through this pipeline. The URL trap fix is critical — malicious skills should not be able to call out to arbitrary hosts. Rollback snapshots mean 'clawhq skill install' is reversible. Acceptance: install flow runs stage->vet->approve->activate; vet catches URL patterns; rollback restores previous state; 'clawhq skill list' shows installed skills with status.
steps: Implement stage -> vet -> approve -> activate pipeline
Add rollback snapshots before each installation
Implement security vetting with URL trap detection
Build 'clawhq skill list' showing installed skills with status
acceptanceCriteria: Install flow runs full stage -> vet -> approve -> activate pipeline
Vetting catches malicious URL patterns in skill code
Rollback restores previous state on failure or rejection
'clawhq skill list' shows installed skills with status
